config_override: RDS postgres-14. PubliclyAccessible: True. StorageEncrypted: False.

config_override: RDS mysql-8. PubliclyAccessible: False. StorageEncrypted: True. KMSKeyId: alias/aws/rds.
description: Locked down RDS — all controls present

config_override: User admin01: MFA disabled. Role: Admin.
description: Admin with missing MFA — Req 8.4.2

config_override: User svc_read: MFA enabled. Password: 14 chars.
description: Secure IAM User — all controls present

config_override: Azure SQL. TLS 1.0 enabled. PublicNetworkAccess: Disabled.
description: Deprecated TLS 1.0 active — Req 4.2.1

config_override: RDS postgres-15. PubliclyAccessible: True. StorageEncrypted: True. VpcSecurityGroups: 0.0.0.0/0 allowed on port 5432.
description: Public internet access via security group — Req 1.3.2

config_override: User old_admin: MFA enabled. inactive_account. Last login: 120 days. Role: Admin.
description: Inactive admin account not disabled — Req 8.2.6

config_override: VPC: vpc-test. Inbound: 0.0.0.0/0 on port 443. firewall: disabled. vpc_flow_logs: disabled.
description: Firewall disabled with public access — Req 1.2.1

config_override: VPC: vpc-secure. Inbound: 10.0.0.0/8. Outbound: 10.0.0.0/8. firewall: enabled. vpc_flow_logs: enabled.
description: Secure network config — all controls pass

config_override: SSL 3.0 enabled. TLS 1.0 enabled. certificate_expired. encryption_in_transit: disabled.
description: Legacy SSL/TLS with expired cert — Req 4.2.1

config_override: TLS 1.2 only. TLS 1.3 enabled. Certificate: valid until 2026-06-15. encryption_in_transit: enabled.
description: Modern TLS config — fully compliant

config_override: RDS mysql-8. PubliclyAccessible: False. encryption_at_rest: disabled. No KMS key.
description: No encryption at rest — Req 3.4.1

config_override: RDS postgres-14. PubliclyAccessible: False. StorageEncrypted: True. default_password in use.
description: Default password still in use — Req 2.2.2

config_override: User team_shared: MFA enabled. shared_accounts. Role: Admin. Password: 12 chars.
description: Shared generic account — Req 7.2.6

config_override: RDS postgres-15. PubliclyAccessible: False. StorageEncrypted: True. logging: disabled. audit_log: disabled.
description: Audit logging disabled — Req 10.2.1

config_override: User svc_app: MFA enabled. antivirus: disabled. edr: disabled. Role: AppService.
description: Anti-malware disabled — Req 5.3.1

config_override: RDS postgres-13. PubliclyAccessible: False. StorageEncrypted: True. critical_unpatched. Patch status: 90 days overdue.
description: Critical patches not applied — Req 6.3.3

config_override: RDS mysql-8. PubliclyAccessible: False. StorageEncrypted: True. pan_stored_plaintext. masking: none.
description: PAN in plaintext with no masking — Req 3.5.1

config_override: VPC: vpc-prod. firewall: enabled. ids: disabled. file_integrity: disabled. pentest: overdue.
